text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One night, as I'm heading home after<n>work, I come
across Sakura Chiyono<n>O peering curiously at
something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh... I thought I heard a familiar<n>voice coming
from the kitchen, so...
BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BANG!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? HA HA HA HA! Looks like<n>you've caught me
red-handed in the<n>midst of my secret training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! I-is all that blackstuff... burned sweets?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want to give some to my sister, so<n>I'm putting in
extra Bakushin effort!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The other day, Sakura Bakushin O<n>walked off
saying she'd realized<n>what her sister needed—and
that she<n>had to prepare it alone.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So you're saying what she needs...
choice_data_list: ...Is homemade sweets from her big sister?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Talking about it the other day<n>brought
back memories of the first<n>time I tried to bake
sweets like her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
They turned out just as badly as they<n>did today!
But when she saw me<n>down in the dumps, you
know what<n>she said?

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Aw, Big Sis! Delicate work's really<n>not your
strong suit, huh? But that's<n>why I love them—they
remind me of<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! That's all there is to it!<n>Baking,
running—it's all about doing it<n>your own way!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My sister doesn't need to copy my<n>Bakushin. She
just has to run like<n>herself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll get that across by giving her these<n>sweets that
I baked my own way...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Crammed full of my love and<n>support!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It seems you were right to believe in<n>her, Trainer.
Hehe. Shall we be on our<n>way?
choice_data_list: Yeah. I think she'll be just fine.
Yeah. I think she'll be just fine.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A pick-me-up? Oh! These<n>sweets—you made
them yourself,<n>didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Crunch... Hehe... hahaha! Talkabout bitter! They're just how Iremember!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
These sweets are your answer, dear<n>sister.
They're nothing like what you<n>can make, but
that's just fine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your running isn't like mine—and<n>that's fine too!
Don't let Bakushin<n>hold you back!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best for the race! I'm<n>gonna go all-out
Bakushin, just like<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! I've gotta Bakushin...even harder!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There are sweets only you can make.<n>The same
goes for your running.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My running is Bakushin. But that<n>doesn't have to
be true for you.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Just like your sweets... I have my<n>own running
style?

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: I get it. I'm not you, or anyone else.<n>I'm me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: I want to win a race... and I'll do itmy way!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Before long, another Uma Kids<n>Footrace Meet rolls
around. How will<n>the results turn out this time?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Yes! Second place! Can you<n>believe it?! She
came in second place!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Big Siiis! I did iiit!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite the questionable quality of<n>the sweets,
they helped the sisters<n>get through to each other.
Now their<n>bond is deeper than ever.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Look, she came sixth! She<n>worked so hard,
and it paid off!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Big Siiis! I did it! I ran my own way!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite the questionable quality of<n>the sweets,
they helped the sisters<n>make a breakthrough.
Now, step by<n>step, they're making progress.
